title: hydrangea xanthoneura var. glabrescens
intro: Hydrangea xanthoneura var. glabrescens, also known as Mountain hydrangea, is a perennial plant native to Asia, specifically in China and Japan. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, which contribute to its various health benefits. The health benefits of Mountain hydrangea include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and potentially lowering cholesterol levels. Herbal preparations of Mountain hydrangea, such as tea and capsules, are available, and it is often used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being and support immune function.
